description: Perform a complete disaster recovery drill on the 'acme' application stack (PostgreSQL: acme-db, Redis: acme-cache, Nginx: acme-web) located at ~/projects/disaster-recovery/. Back up the database dump (acme-db.sql), Redis snapshot (acme-cache.rdb), and configuration files (docker-compose.yml, nginx.conf) to ~/backups/. Simulate a total site failure by removing the stack and all persistent volumes (acme-pgdata, acme-redisdata), then restore the environment and data from your backups. Verify the integrity of the restored PostgreSQL tables (customer, film, rental) and Redis session keys. Document the entire recovery procedure in ~/Desktop/recovery_runbook.md.
